calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Reyes Hunter, CSR#6576.

Dennis R. Wheeler, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff UNIFUND CCR LLC.,
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant KYLE A. BROWN.
Declaration of plaintiff pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-15 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff UNIFUND CCR LLC. and against Defendant KYLE A. BROWN as follows:
Principal $13,293.45
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $451.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $13,745.40

Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Text Ruling
